mode.label: Mode
mode.help: local = plugin starts OpenViking (like Claude Code); remote = use existing HTTP server

configPath.label: Config path (local)
configPath.help: Path to ov.conf when mode is local

baseUrl.label: OpenViking Base URL (remote)
baseUrl.help: HTTP URL when mode is remote (or ${OPENVIKING_BASE_URL})

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Identifies this agent to OpenViking. A random unique ID is generated if not set.

apiKey.label: OpenViking API Key
apiKey.help: Optional API key for OpenViking server

targetUri.label: Search Target URI
targetUri.help: Default OpenViking target URI for memory search

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Extract memories from recent conversation messages via OpenViking sessions

captureMode.label: Capture Mode
captureMode.help: semantic captures all eligible user text; keyword uses trigger regex first

captureMaxLength.label: Capture Max Length
captureMaxLength.help: Maximum sanitized user text length allowed for auto-capture

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject relevant OpenViking memories into agent context

recallMaxContentChars.label: Recall Max Content Chars
recallMaxContentChars.help: Maximum characters per memory content in auto-recall injection

recallPreferAbstract.label: Recall Prefer Abstract
recallPreferAbstract.help: Use memory abstract instead of fetching full content when available

recallTokenBudget.label: Recall Token Budget
recallTokenBudget.help: Maximum estimated tokens for auto-recall memory injection

ingestReplyAssist.label: Ingest Reply Assist
ingestReplyAssist.help: When transcript-like memory ingestion is detected, add a lightweight reply instruction to reduce NO_REPLY.

ingestReplyAssistMinSpeakerTurns.label: Ingest Min Speaker Turns
ingestReplyAssistMinSpeakerTurns.help: Minimum speaker-tag turns (e.g. Name:) to detect transcript-like ingest text.

ingestReplyAssistMinChars.label: Ingest Min Chars
ingestReplyAssistMinChars.help: Minimum sanitized text length required before ingest reply assist can trigger.

compressToolContext.label: Compress Tool Context
compressToolContext.help: Compress oversized tool results before they are assembled into the next model run.

compressReadToolContext.label: Compress Read Tool Context
compressReadToolContext.help: Also compress oversized read tool results. Off by default to avoid hiding useful file content.

compressToolContextAboveChars.label: Compress Tool Context Above Chars
compressToolContextAboveChars.help: Only tool results longer than this are compressed during context assembly.

compressToolContextMaxChars.label: Compress Tool Context Max Chars
compressToolContextMaxChars.help: Maximum chars kept for a compressed tool result in assembled context.

compressToolContextHeadChars.label: Compress Tool Context Head Chars
compressToolContextHeadChars.help: Chars to preserve from the start of oversized tool results when no strong key lines are found.

compressToolContextTailChars.label: Compress Tool Context Tail Chars
compressToolContextTailChars.help: Chars to preserve from the end of oversized tool results.

compressToolContextMaxImportantLines.label: Compress Tool Context Max Important Lines
compressToolContextMaxImportantLines.help: Maximum number of error/warn/key lines preserved from oversized tool results.
